title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
text: The British Museum's collection of 100 objects tells the story of human history, from the earliest tools to the latest technological advancements. This book explores the history of humankind from the Stone Age to the present day, examining the key events and forces that have shaped our species. Habits are powerful forces that shape our lives. Understanding how habits work can help us break bad habits and form good ones.
